creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to sec from comment #5)

"Broken pipe" happens after the likes of your reported:

Core was generated by `/usr/local/libexec/git-core/git index-pack --stdin -v --fix-thin --keep=fetch-pa'.
Program terminated with signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
Address not mapped to object.
. . .

and is because that process (on one end of the pipe) died.

Your core dump information is what is important here, not
directly the broken pipe message.
